post.description: Report is used to submit telemetry events to telemetryd service.
SearchEvent searches for a specific metric in telemetry events and returns them to the client.

name.description:
Name of the field (name of the column when applicable to SQL).
If a filter exists then the name field must not be empty since that
can result in an invalid SQL query and lead to non-descriptive errors.

fspFilter.description: Filter is used to filter results for endpoints that return list of values.

fspFilterType.description:
FilterType represents type of filter that will be applied to SQL query.

 - EQUAL: In case single value is provided, EQUAL will trigger "=" SQL behaviour.
If array of values provided, EQUAL will trigger "IN" SQL behaviour.
 - NOT_EQUAL: In case single value is provided, NOT EQUAL will trigger "<>" SQL behaviour.
If array of values provided, EQUAL will trigger "NOT IN" SQL behaviour.
 - GREATER: GREATER is mapped to SQL '>'.
 - GREATER_OR_EQUAL: GREATER_OR_EQUAL is mapped to SQL '>='.
 - LESS: LESS is mapped to SQL '<'.
 - LESS_OR_EQUAL: LESS_OR_EQUAL is mapped to SQL '<='.

filters.description: filters are optional. No filters will be applied if absent. If multiple provided - will be joined using AND logic.

fspFilteringSortingPagination.description: FilteringSortingPagination aggregates params for filtering, sorting and pagination.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of results per page.

index.description: Index of the requested page, starts from 0.

fspPageParams.description: PageParams represents page request parameters for pagination.

fspPageTotals.description: PageTotals represents total values for pagination and are included in paginated responses.

fspSortingOrder.description:
- ASC: ASC is for ascending sorting order.
 - DESC: DESC is for descending sorting order.

fspSortingParams.description: SortingParams are used to sort results for endpoints that return list of values.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

 The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

typeUrl.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message.

binary.description:
Must be a valid serialized protobuf binary of the above specified type.
Only binary or json field must be set.

json.description:
Must be a valid serialized protobuf JSON of the above specified type.
Only binary or json field must be set.

v1AnyEvent.description:
AnyEvent represents a serialized telemetry event from the events sub-packages.
It is similar to any.Any, but:
* is not a well-known type, so no special support from the library (it is a good thing in our case);
* may contain a JSON variant of serialization.

v1DistributionMethod.description:
DistributionMethod represents PMM Server distribution method.

 - DISTRIBUTION_METHOD_INVALID: DISTRIBUTION_METHOD_INVALID represents unknown distribution method.
 - DOCKER: DOCKER represents Docker distribution method.
 - OVF: OVF represents Open Virtualization Format / Open Virtual Appliance distribution method.
 - AMI: AMI represents Amazon Machine Image distribution method.
 - AZURE: AZURE represents Azure distribution method.
 - DO: DO represents Digital Ocean distribution method.

time.description: Time when this event was received by the sender.

v1Event.description: Event contains original event and additional information added by the sender.

eventTime.description: Time when this event was created and received.

metrics.description: Array of server metrics requested by the client.

v1PMMMetricEvent.description: PMMMetricEvent represents telemetry event containing metrics sent by PMM.

metricName.description: Name of the metric requested by the client.

metricValue.description: Value of the metric requested by the client.

events.description: One or more events to report.

metrics.description:
One or more metrics events to report.
Only 'events' or 'metrics' field must be set.

time.description: Time when this event was received by the sender.

pmmServerTelemetryId.description:
PMM Server unique Telemetry identifier.
Mandatory.

v1ServerMetric.description:
ServerMetrics contains PMM Server metrics.
There are mandatory metrics and optional metric pairs.
The exact metrics pairs (metric name, metric value) is defined by PMM Server.
